mapper.insert: INSERT INTO nx_machine_market_manager ( nx_mm_market_id, nx_mm_wx_openid, nx_mm_wx_unionid, nx_mm_wx_nickname, nx_mm_wx_avatar, nx_mm_phone, nx_mm_name, nx_mm_role, nx_mm_status, nx_mm_create_time ) VALUES ( #{nxMmMarketId}, #{nxMmWxOpenid}, #{nxMmWxUnionid}, #{nxMmWxNickname}, #{nxMmWxAvatar}, #{nxMmPhone}, #{nxMmName}, #{nxMmRole}, #{nxMmStatus}, NOW() )
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM nx_machine_market_manager WHERE nx_mm_id IN
#{nxMmId}
